title: Origin of the shots of the theatre in EoE
display_title: Origin of the shots of the theatre in EoE
wikitext: []: Origin of the shots of the theatre in EoE?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Fri Feb 02, 2018 1:57 pm I never really thought it seemed out of place until I heard GoatJesus' commentary on End of Evangelion, but the theatre footage is really strange. I remember hearing one of the commenters say that the footage was taken just before the premiere of the film in a Japanese theatre, and hastily edited in, but this seems really impractical, and besides, that would mean each theatre would have different footage. As cool as it would've been to see yourself in the middle of Instrumentality, this just wouldn't work. Is there any evidence to suggest this is true? Could the commenter have meant this footage was from the premiere of Death and/or Rebirth?

chunks.content:
Article: Origin of the shots of the theatre in EoE
[]: Origin of the shots of the theatre in EoE?             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Fri Feb 02, 2018 1:57 pm I never really thought it seemed out of place until I heard GoatJesus' commentary on End of Evangelion, but the theatre footage is really strange. I remember hearing one of the commenters say that the footage was taken just before the premiere of the film in a Japanese theatre, and hastily edited in, but this seems really impractical, and besides, that would mean each theatre would have different footage. As cool as it would've been to see yourself in the middle of Instrumentality, this just wouldn't work. Is there any evidence to suggest this is true? Could the commenter have meant this footage was from the premiere of Death and/or Rebirth?
